response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way, sir, and I'll show you the truth. The silver lining of this situation is that the stranger's words may yet change the course of events. Wrap your head around the implications—this is not a moment to be ignored. The lead of the truth is in your hands, and the silver of justice is still waiting to be found."
